scripts.bundle: rm -rf deploy && mkdir -p deploy/app/config deploy/app/controllers deploy/app/models deploy/app/routes deploy/views && cp app.js package.json course-backend.service deploy/ && cp -r app/config/* deploy/app/config/ && cp -r app/controllers/* deploy/app/controllers/ && cp -r app/models/* deploy/app/models/ && cp -r app/routes/* deploy/app/routes/ && cp -r views/* deploy/views/
